name: ANC_PER_ABS_SHIFT_BREAKDOWN
description: This table holds information of the shift breakdown for a person absence entry.

columns.Name: PER_ABS_SHIFT_BREAKDOWN_ID
columns.Comments: Key identifier for breakdown of shifts.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Identifier.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person identifier.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment identifier.

columns.Name: PER_ABSENCE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Person absence entry identifier.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Absence type identifier.

columns.Name: UOM
columns.Comments: Unit of measure for duration.

columns.Name: START_DATETIME
columns.Comments: Start date and time of the shift entry.

columns.Name: END_DATETIME
columns.Comments: End date and time of the shift entry.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Total duration for the shift entry.

columns.Name: DURATION_IN_MILLISECONDS
columns.Comments: Total duration in milliseconds

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This denotes time or elapsed schedule type.

columns.Name: WORK_SCHEDULE_SHIFT_START
columns.Comments: Shift start time as per the work schedule of the person.

columns.Name: WORK_SCHEDULE_SHIFT_END
columns.Comments: Shift end time as per the work schedule of the person.

columns.Name: WORK_SCHEDULE_DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of the shift as per the work schedule of the person.

columns.Name: TIME_CARD_BOUNDARY_SPLIT
columns.Comments: This column is to indicate if Shift breakdown was split due to Timecard boundaries

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
